en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Sienaway ko romi’ad, adihayen ko ninanoman to faedetay a nanom.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: Faedetay ko romi’ad, adihayen ko ninanoman a nanom.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: Ta’angay ko cidal, aka ca pikilidong.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Cowa ko mamacidal anocila, mato’emay ta’angayay ko fali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: Sienaway ko romi’ad, kacikafang a masadak.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Nga’ay ko romi’ad toya romi’ad, cowa ko mama’orad.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Hai, o mama’orad ko romi’ad toya romi’ad.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?

ab: Tomerepay ko ’orad, mahadakay to ko cidal.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: Cowa ka’orad no hatini, mama’orad i ikor no lahok, sidinay to ano mahadak.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Wa sienaw haw i kasienawan no lalomihecaan?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Hai, wa sienaw i kasienawan no lalomihecaan, adihayen ko nicaedongan a riko’.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Anini a mihecaan wa faedet i laloodan haw?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Hai, wa faedet i laloodan, adihayen ko ninanoman.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: Maolahay kako to kacanglahan, dihekoay ko romi’ad.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: Cowa kaolah kako to kafalawfawan, adihayay ko faliyos i kafalawfawan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
